standards.ownership: All resources must return 404 (not 403) when accessed by wrong user
standards.monetary: All monetary values stored as BIGINT cents, never float
standards.auth: JWT middleware must validate alg:none rejection explicitly
standards.logging: Never log PII — use userId UUID not email in all log lines
standards.errors: All error responses must use RFC 7807 Problem Details format
standards.tests: Every endpoint must have an IDOR integration test
standards.cache: Cache invalidation on write: delete key, never update
standards.migrations: All schema changes via goose migrations, never manual SQL
